resources.string: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.
ꯆꯥꯇꯐꯣꯔꯤꯌꯥ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯁꯦꯀꯨꯔ, ꯃꯥꯂꯇꯤꯂꯤꯁ꯭ꯒꯨꯑꯦꯜ ꯃꯦꯁꯦꯖꯔ ꯋꯤꯇ ꯑꯦꯟꯗ-ꯇꯣ-ꯑꯦꯟꯗ ꯑꯦꯟꯀ꯭ꯔꯤꯞꯇꯅꯤ, ꯏꯟꯁꯇꯟꯇ ꯇ꯭ꯔꯥꯟꯁꯂꯦꯁꯟ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯚꯣꯏꯁ/ꯚꯤꯗꯤꯑꯣ ꯀꯣꯜꯤꯡ. ꯀꯤ ꯃꯤꯁꯟ ꯁꯤꯃꯄꯂ: ꯄꯤꯄꯜ ꯀꯣꯟꯅꯦꯛꯇ — ꯁꯦꯐꯂꯤ, ꯄ꯭ꯔꯥꯏꯚꯦꯇꯂꯤ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯂꯥꯡꯒ꯭ꯋꯦꯖ ꯑꯦꯛꯔꯣꯁ.
ꯃꯦꯁꯦꯖ ꯑꯦꯟꯀ꯭ꯔꯤꯞꯇꯦꯗ ꯑꯣꯟ ꯀꯤ ꯗꯤꯕꯥꯏꯁ ꯕꯤꯐꯣꯔ ꯂꯤꯚ. ꯇ꯭ꯔꯥꯟꯁꯂꯦꯁꯟ, ꯕꯦꯛꯌꯥꯞ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯗꯤꯕꯥꯏꯁ ꯁꯤꯟꯁ ꯑꯣꯔ ꯗꯤꯖꯥꯏꯟ ꯇꯣ ꯃꯤꯅꯤꯃꯥꯏꯖ ꯋꯍꯥꯇ ꯁꯔ꯭ꯚꯔ ꯁꯤ.
End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.

Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.

Brief bright flash when a call rings.
Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
Visual alerts for messages & calls\nShow banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)\nTrigger device vibration with notifications.

Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you\'re messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it\'s best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you\'re communicating with before taking any action.

As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

One of the biggest changes in communication is the reduction of geographic barriers. People can now connect with others across the world in near real time. Whether for personal conversations, business, or collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far less limiting.

The future of global communication will likely include more advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved translation, and enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue to become more intuitive and accessible.

Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once required phone calls or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, and more inclusive.
Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, helping people connect more easily across languages and borders.

As communication becomes more digital, privacy and security are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like encryption and user-controlled settings help support a more secure communication experience.

Speed is a key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect messages to be delivered quickly, and modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables more natural and fluid conversations.

Language has traditionally been one of the biggest obstacles to global communication. Today, built-in translation tools help bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users to communicate more easily even if they speak different languages, creating new opportunities for connection and understanding.
Explore insights on communication, online safety, and how messaging technology is connecting people around the world.

People rely on messaging apps for daily communication with friends, family, and colleagues. Whether it\'s a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.

Messaging continues to evolve with new features such as AI-powered responses, translation, and multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even more powerful and versatile.
Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.

Messaging platforms have become one of the most important tools for communication in today’s world. From personal conversations to business interactions, messaging apps allow people to stay connected instantly and efficiently.
Chatforia is built with these principles in mind, offering a fast, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience for a connected world.

Modern messaging platforms focus on giving users control over their data and conversations. Features like encryption, privacy settings, and message controls allow users to communicate with confidence.

One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever

ꯍꯣ ꯑꯄꯂꯥꯏ: ꯕꯨꯇꯟ ꯕꯦꯂꯣ ꯁꯥꯛꯇꯥꯟꯕ ꯏ-ꯃꯦꯏꯜ ꯔꯤꯖꯨꯃ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯂꯤꯟꯛ.
ꯋꯤ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯁꯃꯂ ꯐꯧꯅꯗꯤꯁ ꯇꯤꯃ ꯆꯥꯇꯐꯣꯔꯤꯌꯥ — ꯄ꯭ꯔꯥꯏꯚꯦꯇ, ꯒꯂꯣꯕꯜ ꯃꯦꯁꯦꯖꯔ ꯋꯦꯕ, ꯏꯑꯣꯁ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯑꯦꯟꯗꯔꯣꯏꯗ ꯂꯣꯅꯆꯤꯡ. ꯄ꯭ꯔꯥꯏꯚꯦꯁꯤ, ꯑꯦꯟꯀ꯭ꯔꯤꯞꯇꯅꯤ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯗꯤꯂꯥꯏꯇꯐꯨꯜ ꯌꯨꯁꯔ ꯑꯦꯛꯁꯄꯤꯔꯤꯑꯦꯟꯁ ꯑꯣꯟ ꯀꯦꯔ, ꯋꯤ ꯂꯣꯚ ꯇꯣ ꯍꯤꯔ ꯐ꯭ꯔꯣꯃ.

ꯑꯣꯄꯟ ꯐꯧꯅꯗꯤꯁ ꯔꯣꯜ: ꯂꯤꯗ ꯐꯨꯜ-ꯁ꯭ꯇꯥꯛ ꯏꯟꯖꯤꯅꯤꯌꯔ, ꯕꯦꯛꯑꯦꯟꯗ ꯏꯟꯖꯤꯅꯤꯌꯔ (Node.js), ꯐ꯭ꯔꯣꯟꯇꯦꯟꯗ/ꯋꯦꯕ ꯏꯟꯖꯤꯅꯤꯌꯔ (React), ꯃꯣꯕꯥꯏꯜ ꯏꯟꯖꯤꯅꯤꯌꯔ (iOS), ꯃꯣꯕꯥꯏꯜ ꯏꯟꯖꯤꯅꯤꯌꯔ (Android), ꯗꯦꯚꯑꯣꯄꯁ/SRE, ꯁꯦꯀꯨꯔꯤꯇꯤ & ꯑꯦꯟꯀ꯭ꯔꯤꯞꯇꯅꯤ ꯏꯟꯖꯤꯅꯤꯌꯔ, ꯇꯦꯂꯤꯀꯣꯃ ꯏꯟꯖꯤꯅꯤꯌꯔ (Twilio + eSIM).

• ꯅꯨꯋ ꯒꯂꯣꯕꯜ ꯃꯦꯁꯦꯖꯔ ꯐꯧꯅꯗꯤꯁꯟ ꯍꯦꯜꯄ ꯕꯤꯂꯗ.
• ꯋꯦꯕ, ꯏꯑꯣꯁ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯑꯦꯟꯗꯔꯣꯏꯗ ꯑꯦꯛꯔꯣꯁ ꯏꯃꯄ꯭ꯔꯣꯚꯃꯦꯟꯇ ꯁꯤꯄ.
• ꯐꯧꯅꯗꯔ ꯋꯤꯇ ꯑꯥꯔꯆꯤꯇꯦꯛꯆꯔ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯄ꯭ꯔꯣꯗꯒꯨꯛꯇ ꯗꯥꯏꯔꯦꯛꯁꯟ ꯗꯥꯏꯔꯦꯛꯇꯂꯤ ꯋꯔꯛ.
• ꯁ꯭ꯇꯥꯛ ꯑꯣꯐ ꯍꯥꯏ-ꯏꯃꯄ꯭ꯔꯥꯛꯇ ꯑꯦꯔꯤꯌꯥ ꯑꯣꯟ: ꯃꯦꯁꯦꯖꯤꯡ, ꯚꯣꯏꯁ, ꯚꯤꯗꯤꯑꯣ, ꯑꯦꯟꯀ꯭ꯔꯤꯞꯇꯅꯤ, ꯇꯦꯂꯤꯀꯣꯃ, AI.
• ꯕꯤꯒꯤꯟꯤꯁ ꯑꯣꯟ ꯖꯣꯏꯟ — ꯌꯨꯁꯔ ꯕꯦꯁ ꯁ꯭ꯀꯦꯂ ꯕꯤꯐꯣꯔ.

Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).
Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.
Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.
We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.
Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.
We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.
Add a recipient above to start…

If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.

ꯐꯦꯃꯤꯂꯤ ꯑꯦꯛꯔꯣꯁ ꯑꯣꯟ ꯁꯤꯁꯤꯡꯂ ꯗꯥꯇꯥ ꯄꯨꯜ ꯁꯦꯌꯥꯔ. ꯑꯣꯟ ꯕꯤꯜ, ꯃꯥꯂꯇꯤꯄꯂ ꯆꯥꯇꯐꯣꯔꯤꯌꯥ ꯑꯦꯛꯀꯥꯎꯟꯇ, ꯒꯂꯣꯕꯜ ꯀꯣꯕꯔꯦꯖ.
ꯍꯣꯌ. ꯑꯦꯄ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯕꯤꯂꯤꯡ ꯄꯥꯖ ꯐ꯭ꯔꯣꯃ ꯁꯔꯁꯛꯔꯤꯄꯁꯟ ꯃꯦꯅꯥꯖ ꯅ꯭ꯔꯤ ꯀꯥꯟꯁꯦꯜ. ꯆꯦꯟꯖ ꯀꯔꯦꯟꯇ ꯕꯤꯂꯤꯡ ꯄꯤꯔꯤꯑꯗ ꯑꯦꯟꯗ ꯑꯣꯟ ꯑꯦꯐꯦꯛꯇ.

ꯐꯦꯃꯤꯂꯤ ꯄꯥꯛ ꯃꯥꯂꯇꯤꯄꯂ ꯆꯥꯇꯐꯣꯔꯤꯌꯥ ꯑꯦꯛꯀꯥꯎꯟꯇ ꯑꯦꯛꯔꯣꯁ ꯁꯦꯌꯥꯔꯗ ꯗꯥꯇꯥ ꯄꯨꯜ ꯁꯥꯛꯇꯥꯟꯕ. ꯑꯣꯟ ꯄꯔꯁꯟ ꯄꯦꯌ ꯕꯤꯜ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯃꯦꯃꯕꯔ ꯏꯟꯇꯥꯏꯇ ꯅ꯭ꯔꯤ ꯔꯤꯃꯣꯚ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯄꯔ ꯄꯔꯁꯟ ꯂꯤꯃꯤꯇ ꯁꯦꯇ.
ꯍꯣꯌ. ꯐ꯭ꯔꯤ ꯄ꯭ꯔꯥꯟ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯆꯥꯇꯐꯣꯔꯤꯌꯥ ꯅꯌꯝꯕꯔ, ꯀꯣꯜꯤꯡ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯃꯦꯁꯦꯖꯤꯡ ꯋꯤꯇ ꯑꯦꯗ. ꯐ꯭ꯔꯤ ꯑꯁ ꯂꯣꯡ ꯑꯣꯟ ꯁꯇꯦ, ꯅ꯭ꯔꯤ ꯑꯄꯒ꯭ꯔꯦꯗ ꯇꯣ ꯑꯦꯗ ꯔꯤꯃꯣꯚ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯃꯣꯔ ꯐꯤꯇ꯭ꯔ ꯑꯅꯂꯣꯛ.
ꯄꯂꯁ ꯑꯦꯗ ꯔꯤꯃꯣꯚ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯃꯦꯁꯦꯖ ꯍꯤꯁ꯭ꯇꯣꯔꯤ ꯑꯦꯛꯁꯇꯦꯟꯗ — ꯑꯦꯚ꯭ꯔꯤꯗꯥꯏ ꯌꯨꯁ ꯐꯣꯔ. ꯄ꯭ꯔꯤꯃꯤꯌꯥꯝ ꯑꯦꯛꯁꯇ꯭ꯔꯥ ꯀꯁ꯭ꯇꯝꯤꯖꯦꯁꯟ, AI ꯇꯨꯜꯁ ꯐꯣꯔ ꯔꯤꯋꯔꯥꯏꯇ ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯔꯤꯄꯂꯥꯏ, ꯑꯃꯁꯨꯁ ꯄ꯭ꯔꯥꯏꯣꯔꯤꯇꯤ ꯁꯄꯣꯔꯇ ꯐꯣꯔ ꯍꯦꯕꯤ ꯌꯨꯁꯔ.
